summary: Completed comprehensive testing of VIIBE Scene Intelligence Platform - Iteration 5. All 4 new features (OG Meta Tags, Receipt Generator, Weekly Report, Press Kit) are fully functional. Backend: 16/16 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All pages load correctly with proper data-testid attributes, navigation works, and all interactive elements function as expected.
passed_tests: OG meta tags present in index.html (og:title, og:description, og:image, twitter:card, twitter:image)
POST /api/receipt/generate returns receipt with venue_name, receipt_id, vibe_score, energy_state, scout_name
POST /api/receipt/generate works for all 10 seeded venues
GET /api/report/weekly returns full report with summary, top_venues, energy_tiers, district_breakdown, category_breakdown
/receipt page loads with form (venue select + username input + generate button)
/receipt page: selecting venue and clicking generate shows receipt card with venue name, score, download/share buttons
/report page loads and displays weekly report with stats grid, energy distribution, top venues, coldest venues, district energy, category breakdown
/press page loads with brand info, key stats (474+, 16+, 8), founder section, brand colors, typography, quick links, logo section
Footer contains links to Receipt, Report, and Press pages
Navbar contains link to Press page
Landing page (/) loads correctly with Lagos Pulse widget
Navigation between all routes works correctly
All existing API endpoints still functional (city/pulse, venues/live, venue detail, waitlist stats)
seed_data_creation: Using existing 10 Lagos venues seeded in MongoDB
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 new features (OG Meta Tags, Receipt Generator, Weekly Report, Press Kit) are fully functional. Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_viibe_api.py cover receipt generation, weekly report, and existing endpoints. Frontend uses data-testid attributes for all interactive elements. The html2canvas library is used for receipt download but may not work in headless testing - button existence was verified instead.

og_meta_tags.details: All OG tags present: og:title='VIIBE — Scene Intelligence', og:description, og:image, twitter:card='summary_large_image', twitter:image

receipt_generator.details: Form with venue select, username input, generate button. Receipt card displays venue name, score, energy state, scout name, download/share buttons

weekly_report.details: Stats grid (10 venues, avg energy, active scouts, peak night), energy distribution tiers, top 5 venues, coldest 3 venues, district breakdown, category breakdown, trending list

press_kit.details: Brand info, key stats (474+, 16+, 8), founder section, story section, brand colors, typography (Unbounded + JetBrains Mono), quick links, logo section

navigation.details: Navbar has Press link, Footer has Receipt/Report/Press links, all navigation works correctly
